summary: Full testing of Word export feature (iteration 4). All 12 backend tests and all frontend tests passed. Tested: Content-Type, Content-Disposition with filename, ZIP validity, word/document.xml presence, article titles in XML, cover page title, French date, 404 for unknown session, session with images. Frontend: btn-export-word and btn-export-zip both visible, side by side on desktop, correct labels, both buttons trigger correct API endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py: export_session_word correctly uses run_in_threadpool for synchronous python-docx calls — good async pattern.
build_word() correctly handles missing images with fallback text placeholders (lines 637, 654) — graceful degradation.
Page break logic: breaks after all articles except the last (i < len(articles) - 1) — correct.
SessionRecap.jsx: flex-wrap justify-center gap-3 layout ensures buttons wrap on small screens and stay side by side on desktop — correct.
handleExportWord uses window.location.href which works for file download but does not update React state — acceptable for download trigger.
LOGO_CDN_URL is a hardcoded CDN constant (not env var) — acceptable for an asset URL, not a credential.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — both buttons visible, side by side, correct API call on click

seed_data_creation: 2 test sessions created by pytest fixtures (TEST_WordExport_Empty_Session, TEST_WordExport_Articles_Session) and cleaned up after tests. Used existing session 5a81d182-0d09-4978-9b18-598d6bdb7488 (with real fal.media picto/illustration URLs) for integration test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Word export feature fully tested and working. Backend: GET /api/sessions/{id}/export-word returns valid .docx (ZIP with word/document.xml), correct Content-Type, correct Content-Disposition with session title in filename, 404 for unknown session, graceful placeholder handling when images unavailable. Frontend: SessionRecap.jsx has btn-export-word (outline purple button with FileText icon) and btn-export-zip (blue button with Download icon) side by side in flex-wrap layout. Session 5a81d182-0d09-4978-9b18-598d6bdb7488 has valide:true for picto and illustration — usable for future tests.
rca_of_issues: No issues found. All export-word endpoints and UI flows are functional.
